content: Cross-reference integrity gaps (ghost agent references in artifact reader/writer lists) are a predictable failure mode when roster agents are renamed or restructured during gap-hunting. In this run, gaps CR-004 and CR-005 involved a 'plot-architect' reference in foreshadowing-ledger.json and mystery-box-inventory.json readers — an agent name that existed in an earlier roster draft but was restructured. Future runs should include an automated cross-reference sweep after any roster modification to catch stale references immediately rather than waiting for the gap-hunting cycle.
sourceEvidence: Category 6 (Cross-Reference Integrity) resolved: CR-004: 'foreshadowing-ledger.json readers no longer contains plot-architect. Now: [tension-mapper, adversarial-auditor, craft-beta-reader, continuity-tracker].' CR-005: 'mystery-box-inventory.json readers no longer contains plot-architect. Now: [tension-mapper, chapter-drafter, adversarial-auditor].'

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
